name: Dr. Finlay's Casebook
overview: Dr Finlay's Casebook is a BBC television series that was broadcast from 1962 until 1971. Based on A. J. Cronin's novella Country Doctor, the storylines centred on a general medical practice in the fictional Scottish town of Tannochbrae during the late 1920s.

trailers.title: Dr Finlay's Casebook - Series 1 - Available now
